bullets: • The choice of features significantly impacts learning algorithm performance.
• Feature engineering involves creating new features from existing ones to improve model accuracy.
• Combining features, like calculating land area from width and depth, can make features more predictive.
• Feature engineering uses problem-specific knowledge to transform or combine original features.
• One type of feature engineering can fit non-linear functions to data, enhancing model flexibility.
raw:
• The choice of features significantly impacts learning algorithm performance.
• Feature engineering involves creating new features from existing ones to improve model accuracy.
• Combining features, like calculating land area from width and depth, can make features more predictive.
• Feature engineering uses problem-specific knowledge to transform or combine original features.
• One type of feature engineering can fit non-linear functions to data, enhancing model flexibility.
